tagline: Designing scalable, high-performance full-stack products — from APIs and UIs to ML and GenAI pipelines.
description: Senior Python Full-Stack Developer building cloud-native apps, GenAI systems, and production-grade platforms across healthcare, finance, and media. AWS Certified Developer.

roles.detailed: Full-Stack · Python · GenAI · AWS · Azure · GCP

bio: I'm Anudeep Pasala, a Senior Python Full-Stack Developer with over 11+ years of expertise designing, implementing, and shipping scalable applications across healthcare, finance, and media. My work spans APIs and microservices, React and Angular front ends, and ML/GenAI pipelines including Clinical Trials (CTMS) platforms. I build cloud-native systems on AWS, Azure, and GCP, and use AI-assisted tools (Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT) to deliver production-grade products end to end.

bullets: Designed scalable Python microservices for WBD's media streaming platform on AWS Lambda with API Gateway and CloudFormation.
Built Django backend services integrated with RDS and DynamoDB; used S3 for high-traffic media asset management.
Implemented event-driven architecture using SQS, SNS, and Kafka for decoupled async communication across content pipelines.
Reduced release cycle time by over 40% via GitHub Actions CI/CD with Dockerized deployments to AWS EC2.
experience.desc: Media streaming microservices on AWS Lambda, Django + RDS/DynamoDB, event-driven pipelines with Kafka, and CI/CD cutting release cycles 40%+.

bullets: Architected scalable API systems on AWS Lambda and ECS Fargate secured with Cognito and OAuth; optimized with API Gateway and WAF.
Built and maintained CI/CD via CodePipeline on EKS using Terraform and CloudFormation with EventBridge automation.
Developed and fine-tuned GenAI models with TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Hugging Face; built GPT-powered pipelines with FastAPI.
Automated Windows infrastructure provisioning with Python + PowerShell, reducing manual setup time by over 60%.
experience.desc: GenAI and FastAPI pipelines on AWS EKS, Terraform CI/CD, and secure APIs with Cognito — 60%+ reduction in manual infra setup.

bullets: Implemented scalable Flask APIs with Azure AD OAuth SSO and RBAC; optimized with Redis caching and Celery async processing.
Developed Python data pipelines for Clinical Trials (CTMS) using Pandas, Polars, and PySpark for large-scale cohort data processing.
Built ML pipelines with scikit-learn and TensorFlow; designed Kubeflow Pipelines with Argo Workflows for automated model CD.
Leveraged AI coding agents (Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT) to accelerate sprint velocity across the healthcare data engineering team.
experience.desc: Healthcare CTMS data pipelines with PySpark, Flask APIs on Azure AD, and Kubeflow ML automation at scale.

bullets: Deployed API systems on Amazon SageMaker, AWS Lambda, Kubernetes, and Snowflake REST API Gateway for financial workloads.
Designed serverless architectures with Lambda, DynamoDB, Cognito, and API Gateway for scalable banking applications.
Delivered full-stack banking features end-to-end — Django REST APIs and AngularJS SPAs with MongoDB and PySpark for customer-facing financial workflows.
Implemented validation of row counts during on-premises to cloud migration; designed framework for converting PowerCenter mappings to PySpark jobs.
experience.desc: Serverless banking APIs on Lambda and SageMaker, Snowflake integrations, and PySpark migration frameworks.

bullets: Led full SDLC projects in Agile; built resilient RESTful APIs with Python, Terraform, AngularJS, and Camunda in a distributed GCP environment.
Developed Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) using Django, Flask, MongoDB, and microservices on GCP with Elasticsearch optimization.
Built AWS Lambda functions with Python and Node.js; orchestrated Docker containers with Kubernetes for DevOps infrastructure.
Created Python-PowerShell integration toolset for dynamic script generation via Django web UI for remote operations.
experience.desc: GCP microservices, RMM platform with Django/Flask, and Kubernetes-orchestrated DevOps automation.

bullets: Developed a responsive website with a new UI; built Tableau visual reports for application data.
Implemented TDD using the unit test framework in Agile/Scrum with weekly sprints and stakeholder demos.
Built dynamic web pages using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript; performed capacity planning and MySQL performance tuning.
Handled full web application lifecycle — maintenance, testing, debugging, and deployment.
experience.desc: Full-stack Python web delivery, Tableau reporting, and MySQL performance tuning in Agile insurance workflows.

projects.title: Media Metadata Engine
projects.subtitle: Visual metadata & searchable insights
projects.desc: AI-powered media asset analyzer and library — tags, mood, colors, and usage suggestions. Built with Streamlit, SQLite, Gemini, and FFmpeg for production-ready discovery workflows.

projects.title: AI Document Assistant
projects.subtitle: Production RAG for PDF Q&A
projects.desc: End-to-end RAG app: upload PDFs, ask questions, get cited answers. FastAPI backend, Chroma vector store, Gemini embeddings, offline fallback mode, evaluation harness, and integration tests.

projects.title: Cursor-skills
projects.subtitle: Reusable Cursor rules & prompts
projects.desc: A standard operating system for building software — reusable Cursor rules and prompts you can plug into any repository to ship faster with AI-assisted development.

publications.title: Parkinson's Disease Detection using Machine Learning Techniques
publications.desc: By Anudeep Pasala — hybrid ML for early Parkinson's detection: K-means and decision trees on UCI voice data, plus PCA and SVM on spiral drawings (~87% accuracy).

publications.title: The Cloud Is Getting Smarter: Why AI Agents Are the Next Upgrade to AWS
publications.desc: Part 1 of the series When Cloud Starts Thinking — how AI agents observe, reason, and act inside AWS across S3, IAM, Lambda, and SQS.

publications.title: When Cloud Starts Thinking
publications.desc: More articles on Python, AWS, and AI agents in the cloud — follow on Medium @anudeep22.
